records.ety: [OF. enfeblir, enfeiblir; pref. en- (L. in) + feble, F. faible, feeble. See Feeble.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Enfeebled (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Enfeebling (?).]

defs: To make feeble; to deprive of strength; to reduce the strength or force of; to weaken; to debilitate.
quotes: Enfeebled by scanty subsistence and excessive toil.
